TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tamim_bin_Hamad_Al_Thani, title = Tamim_bin_Hamad_Al_Thani, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamim_bin_Hamad_Al_Thani} }

S.FORM: Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 6, Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Qatar ta' misuw hya' ga Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 6, Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Qatar ta' misuw hya' ga Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tamim βin ħama* al tħani rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tamim βin ħama* al tħani, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw qatar taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa tamim βin ħama* al tħani, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
